vocab.example: If the item is not just heavy but also cumbersome, I usually opt for a trolley to avoid straining my back.

vocab.meaning: nhấc bổng hoặc kéo một vật nặng (với nỗ lực lớn)
vocab.example: I had to heave the oversized suitcase into the trunk of the car with all my might.

vocab.meaning: nhờ vả sự giúp đỡ của ai đó
vocab.example: When a package is far too heavy for one person, I typically enlist the help of a friend or a bystander.

vocab.meaning: vất vả, cực nhọc (đến mức muốn gãy lưng)
vocab.example: Moving furniture can be back-breaking work, so I prefer hiring professional movers for the heavy lifting.

vocab.meaning: điều khiển, xoay xở (vật nặng) một cách khéo léo
vocab.example: It took quite some effort to maneuver the heavy washing machine through the narrow doorway.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực hết mình, gắng sức
vocab.example: I try not to over-exert myself when carrying heavy boxes to prevent any potential muscle injuries.

vocab.meaning: to lớn, chiếm nhiều diện tích
vocab.example: For bulky and weighted items, I often rely on home delivery services rather than trying to transport them myself.
If I'm carrying heavy groceries, I try to distribute the weight evenly between both hands to maintain my balance.

vocab.meaning: trọng lượng cực kỳ nặng (nhấn mạnh sự nặng nề)
vocab.example: The sheer weight of the anvil made it nearly impossible for me to budge it even an inch.
I always make sure to use a sturdy bag with reinforced handles when I have to carry something substantial.
